title: Amtech - Performance Work Gloves for DIY, Gardening, and More, Nitrile Coated for High Abrasion Resistance, Suitable for Dry and Wet Conditions, Durable and Long Lasting (XL, Size 10)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DIY STAPLE: Ideal for protecting your hands while you work on a wide range of DIY, gardening, and household maintenance tasks. A must-have for both professionals and DIY beginners!

DURABLE: Made with a 13 gauge nylon and Nitrile coated palms for high abrasion resistance, so they’ll withstand wear and tear caused by working with mechanical parts, and repetitive scraping or rubbing - long lasting for extra confidence.

VERSATILE: These lightweight work gloves feature a sandy textured finish for an improved grip in both wet and dry conditions. Also with breathable knitted backs and elasticated cuffs for ultimate comfort!
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description Made from tough 13 gauge nylon with nitrile coated palms. Ideal for a wide range of DIY, home, gardening, and maintenance tasks. A sandy textured finish makes them suitable for wet and dry conditions.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎CE compliant, Durable 13 gauge nylon with nitrile coated palms, Lightweight gloves coming with a sandy textured finish providing a high abrasion resistance in wet & dry conditions
